refined_caption: The hospital food tray contains bread, butter, jam, and a drink, but appears unappetizing. The presentation of the food is uninviting.
complaint_description: I was disappointed with the food served to me during my hospital stay. The food tray had bread, butter, jam, and a drink, but it looked unappetizing and lacked presentation. I was expecting a more appealing meal to help with my recovery.
voice_text: The food they're serving here looks really unappetizing, it's just a plain tray with some bread and stuff on it.
